title: Cold coals
description: The fire is out; just a faint coal glow inside the rock ring. Five logs sit around.
must_include: Ring of stones; 5 seating logs; tent silhouette; wood arrow sign; lantern left FG
lighting: Moon rim low; no key; deep vignette

title: First strike
description: A match scrapes; a weak flare kisses tinder but dies.
must_include: Match hand silhouette near frame edge; ring center
lighting: Fire key small; lantern spill faint; cool rim

title: Battery at 3%
description: Over-the-shoulder of a phone screen: 12:03 AM, Battery 3%. Camp ring soft behind.
must_include: Phone UI; time and battery; ring bokeh
lighting: Phone glow key on hands; fire dim

title: Marker stones
description: Right-side birch with three stacked marker stones reads in silhouette.
lighting: Low fire; cool rim accents trunk

title: All together
description: Full ring composition: five logs, tent back-center, sign on right, lantern left.
must_include: Logs x5; tent center-back; sign right; lantern left
lighting: Healthy fire key; lantern practical warm; moon rim

title: Missing chair
description: The fourth seat is suddenly empty; others unchanged.
must_include: Empty fourth log; ring alignment preserved
lighting: Fire lower; shadows longer; subtle chill

title: Live Photo find
description: Phone OTS scrubbing a Live Photo reveals a slim silhouette in treeline.
must_include: Scrubber UI; slim silhouette in trees left
lighting: Phone glow on hands; background near-dark

title: Phones only
description: The fire is fully out; only four phones cast cones of light onto faces/hands.
must_include: Four phone beams; faces/hands picks; ring faint
lighting: No fire; pure phone keys; blue-cool spill

title: Almost ignition
description: Macro near-ignition — ember brightens but fails; sparks drift.

title: Dawn pocket glow
description: Blue dawn gradient returns; pocket glows warm near a jacket; ring resets.
must_include: Jacket pocket warm dot; tent silhouette; sign
lighting: Pre-dawn cool ambient + tiny warm dot
